title: How to change subitems when an item column changes?

posts.author: cryptomark (Mark Berry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!
Is there any way to create a Monday automation that updates a subitem column to match a parent’s column? So when the top line “Market” changes to Chicago, then the subitem’s all change to Chicago.

I know subitems are getting more functionality at end of Q1. Any details on what this will entail?
Thanks!
Mark

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@cryptomark

Currently, there is no way to do what you’re asking for with standard automations.

You would need to use something outside base monday like Integromat/Make. There might be an app in the marketplace that could do that; but, nothing comes to mind.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: Should I convert my Integromat account to Make? - YouTube
Contact me directly here: Contact – The Monday Man

posts.author: cryptomark (Mark Berry)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you!!! Good to know… Here’s the sub-item product plan: Subitems Product Plan

posts.author: MauritsNWC (MauritsNWC)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am also feverischly looking for this option. Seems like a very basic option for a Workflow application. Hope Subitems get some love soon.

  • You can connect and mirror the parent items Status column in the subitem, but should be done manually for every item (so it does not work for our us, we nee automation).
  • there actually is a way to set it all up (need several mirrors, and +4 automations), but then the automation just does not run.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MauritsNWC

We developed an app that solves this exact problem of changing subitems based on their parent item and automatically linking between them. Here are a few examples -

Matching the subitem’s value to the parent item value when created →

Screenshot 2024-01-11 at 17.34.012184×424 30 KB

Matching the subitem’s value to the parent item value when parent changes →

Screenshot 2024-01-11 at 17.35.252210×492 28.6 KB

Automatically linking item to its parent item so you can use mirrors -

Screenshot 2024-01-11 at 17.34.261714×346 15.6 KB

We’re constantly adding new capabilities You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

You can do that easily with our Subitems Pro Automations app. It includes a automations that allows you to copy an item’s column value to a selected column in all its subitems.

  1. When column changes
    image334×260 8.36 KB
  2. When subitem is created
    image332×261 8.98 KB

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!
